history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with messy black hair, wearing a black t-shirt with a white star graphic and black shorts, is seated and leaning against a textured, light-colored wall. The lighting is dramatic, with strong shadows cast by the man and the wall, creating a chiaroscuro effect. The background is dark and out of focus, with a hint of a ceiling or overhang visible. The man's pose is relaxed yet contemplative, with his gaze directed slightly upwards and to the side. He is wearing a dark beaded bracelet on his left wrist. The overall mood is moody, stylish, and slightly edgy, with a limited color palette dominated by black, white, and shades of grey. The image has a photographic quality, possibly captured with a shallow depth of field to emphasize the subject.
